channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Value investing’s resurgence highlights risks of staying out of equities
item.description: The article examines the renewed strength of value investing and argues that maintaining zero exposure to equities is becoming an increasingly risky strategy. Contributor Arian Neiron reflects on earl...

item.title: Debate grows over the cost and impact of Barack Obama’s presidential centre in Chicago
item.description: The article examines growing criticism surrounding the Obama Presidential Center, an $850 million project being built in Chicago’s South Side and scheduled to open in June 2026. Critics, including som...

item.title: Deep Fission Pursues Nasdaq IPO Amid Financial Struggles and Technical Uncertainty
item.description: Deep Fission, a nuclear startup focused on building underground reactors to power AI data centers, is attempting to go public once again through a traditional Nasdaq IPO. The company is seeking to rai...

item.title: Argonauts defeat Tiger-Cats 20–10 in CFL preseason as Hicks scores twice
item.description: The Toronto Argonauts opened their CFL preseason schedule with a 20–10 victory over the Hamilton Tiger-Cats in Hamilton, highlighted by a strong second-half performance and two rushing touchdowns from...

item.title: Bihar approves ₹350 crore industrial investments expected to create 2,300 jobs
item.description: The Bihar Industrial Area Development Authority (BIADA) has approved a fresh set of industrial projects that are expected to significantly boost employment and investment in the state. In a Project Cl...

item.title: Police respond to reported gunfire incident near the White House in Washington
item.description: Authorities responded to reports of possible gunfire near the White House in Washington, DC, leading to a large police presence around the area. According to the brief report published by Agence Franc...

item.title: Childhood Photos of Noel and Liam Gallagher Highlight Their Difficult Upbringing in Manchester
item.description: The article reflects on the difficult childhood experiences of Noel and Liam Gallagher, the brothers who later became famous as members of the rock band Oasis. Raised in the working-class neighborhood...

item.title: Fiorentina and Atalanta share 1-1 draw as both end underwhelming Serie A campaign
item.description: Fiorentina and Atalanta played out a 1-1 draw in their final Serie A fixture, concluding what has been a disappointing season for both Italian clubs. The match, played in Florence, saw Fiorentina take...

item.title: Marco Rubio and PM Modi Discuss Energy Cooperation, Trade, and Regional Security in New Delhi Meeting
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi during his four-day visit to India, with discussions focusing on strengthening bilateral ties across energy, trade, defe...

item.title: Centre informs Supreme Court about Indians serving in Russian forces and casualties in Russia-Ukraine war
item.description: The Union Government has informed the Supreme Court that 217 Indian nationals have joined the Russian armed forces amid the ongoing Russia-Ukraine conflict. Out of these, 49 individuals have died, six...

item.title: British student seriously injured in scooter crash during gap year in India
item.description: A 21-year-old British student named Olivia suffered severe injuries after a scooter crash in Goa, India, during the final days of her gap year travels. According to her father, Nic North, Olivia was n...

item.title: An overview of bone broth and its potential health benefits
item.description: This article discusses bone broth, its historical background, and the possible health benefits associated with its consumption. Bone broth has been used across different cultures for centuries, with e...

item.title: African ambassadors boycott Pretoria Africa Day event amid xenophobia concerns
item.description: African ambassadors from several countries across the continent have decided to boycott South Africa’s main Africa Day celebrations, citing serious concerns over the safety of their citizens amid a re...

item.title: AMD to Restrict Linux Access in Free Tier of Vivado FPGA Development Tool Starting 2026.1
item.description: AMD has announced changes to the licensing model of its Vivado FPGA development tool beginning with the 2026.1 release, affecting the availability of its free tier. According to a report based on a Sl...

item.title: Blue Jays defeat Pirates 5-2 as Springer and Corbin lead Toronto to fourth straight win
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays continued their strong run of form on Saturday with a 5-2 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates at Rogers Centre, extending their winning streak to four games. George Springer set ...

item.title: How Australia’s 2026 budget changes may reshape investment choices in property and shares
item.description: Recent changes announced in Australia’s 2026 federal budget are expected to significantly influence how and where investors allocate their money. Key reforms include the replacement of the existing 50...

item.title: NBI urges Congress to pass measures against troll farms and AI-generated deepfakes
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has called on Congress to create stronger laws that will specifically address the growing problems caused by troll farms and artificial intelligence-generate...

item.title: Two people critically injured after Secret Service shooting near the White House
item.description: Two people were critically injured after a shooting involving the U.S. Secret Service near the White House in Washington on Saturday evening. According to a law enforcement official speaking anonymous...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Guide for May 24, 2026 by Master Hanz Cua
item.description: The article published by ABS-CBN Lifestyle features a brief daily feng shui reading attributed to Master Hanz Cua for May 24, 2026. It forms part of the platform’s regular lifestyle content that offer...

item.title: Ntuzuma court hands down life plus 45-year sentence to KwaZulu-Natal man for multiple murders and attempted murder
item.description: The Ntuzuma Regional Court in KwaZulu-Natal has sentenced Peterson Booysen to life imprisonment plus an additional 45 years after being convicted on three counts of murder and two counts of attempted ...
